postToolUse.bash: command -v tflint >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; dirs=$( { git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- '*.tf' '*.tfvars' '*.hcl' 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- '*.tf' '*.tfvars' '*.hcl' 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- '*.tf' '*.tfvars' '*.hcl' 2>/dev/null; } | awk 'NF' | sed 's|/[^/]*$||' | sort -u ); if [ -z "$dirs" ]; then exit 0; fi; fails=0; echo "$dirs" | while IFS= read -r dir; do [ -d "$dir" ] || continue; tflint --init --chdir "$dir" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; tflint --fix --chdir "$dir" || fails=$((fails + 1)); done; if [ "$fails" -gt 0 ]; then exit 2; fi
